message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #D9D9E8
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ActorBackgroundColor #D9D9E8
  NoteBorderColor #000000
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
}

actor Customer
participant TripFinder
participant Trip
participant Bicycle

Customer -> TripFinder : suitable_trips(\n  on_date,\n  difficulty,\n  need_bike)
activate TripFinder

TripFinder -> Trip : suitable_trips(\n  on_date,\n  on_difficulty)
activate Trip
Trip --> TripFinder
deactivate Trip

note over TripFinder
for each trips
end note

TripFinder -> Bicycle : suitable_bicycle(\n  trip_date,\n  route_type)
activate Bicycle
Bicycle --> TripFinder
deactivate Bicycle

TripFinder --> Customer : result
deactivate TripFinder
@enduml
